deployMechanism.dockerfile: server/Dockerfile (tracked, proven - built current live image)
deployMechanism.ciWorkflow: azure-deploy-demo.yml is a DISABLED skeleton (not wired)

blocker.what: Azure SQL InsuranceAIPlatform DB lacks the RAG schema (EvidenceChunks/RagAuditTraces/RagEvaluationQuestions/PolicyClauses)
evidence: live image 14d5c81 predates AddRagFoundation migration 20260604 (commit 912e841 > Azure SQL deploy 70af774)
API Program.cs has no startup Migrate/Seed (only Build+Run); seeding is separate DbMigrator
blocker.consequence: deploying RAG image -> /rag/infrastructure queries missing tables -> HTTP 500 (STOP condition)
blocker.conflict: fix requires EF/schema migration, which THIS gate forbids (NO schema/EF migration)
blocker.demoRisk: flipping SWA to backend would break the working public mock demo
blocker.certainty: strong inference (not direct SQL query; firewall/Entra blocks read-only table list without a resource change)

decision: STOP BLOCKED before any Azure mutation; all Azure calls read-only; live demo intact; no rollback needed (nothing deployed)
recommendedPrerequisiteGate: AZURE_SQL_RAG_MIGRATE_SEED_V0.1 (apply AddRagFoundation + RagSeeder to Azure SQL, separately authorized) then re-run this deploy gate
